---
title: "Batteries"
subtitle: "Figures"
output: html_document
date: "2024-12-13"
---

# Figures

```{r setup-07, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE)

library(ggplot2)

keep <- ls()
if(! exists("figs")){
  stop("Cannot process figures unless they are present!")
}
if(! (is.list(figs) & all(sapply(figs, function(x) "ggplot" %in% class(x))))){
  stop("The `figs` object must be a list of `ggplot` objects!")
}
```


```{r figures}
if(is.null(names(figs))){
  nm <- paste0("figure.", 1:length(figs))
} else {
  nm <- names(figs)
  if(any(grepl("^$", nm))){
    ndx <- (1:length(nm))[grepl("^$", nm)]
    nm[ndx] <- paste0("figure.", ndx)
  }
}

for(i in 1:length(figs)){
  paste0("figs/", nm[i], ".png") %>% ggsave(plot=figs[[i]])
}
rm(nm, i, ndx)
```

```{r cleanup-07}
rm(list=intersect(ls(), c("book_flag", "csv_dir", "intmdt_dir")))
```
